info.name: Hotel Booking Management API
info.description: Postman collection for the Hotel Booking Management backend. Most requests use the GraphQL endpoint. Run Login first so Postman stores the authentication cookie for protected requests.

body.raw: {"query":"mutation Register($userInput: UserInput!) { register(userInput: $userInput) { id name email role membershipTier referralCode referralPoints isActive } }","variables":{"userInput":{"name":"Test User","email":"test@example.com","password":"password123"}}}

{"query":"mutation Login($email: String!, $password: String!) { login(email: $email, password: $password) { id name email role membershipTier referralCode referralPoints isActive } }","variables":{"email":"test@example.com","password":"password123"}}
{"query":"query CurrentUser { currentUser { id name email avatar { url public_id } role membershipTier referralCode referralPoints isActive createdAt updatedAt } }"}
{"query":"query Logout { logout }"}
{"query":"mutation UpdateUserProfile($userInfo: UpdateUserInput!) { updateUserProfile(userInfo: $userInfo) }","variables":{"userInfo":{"name":"Updated User","email":"updated@example.com"}}}

{"query":"mutation UpdateUserPassword($oldPassword: String!, $newPassword: String!) { updateUserPassword(oldPassword: $oldPassword, newPassword: $newPassword) }","variables":{"oldPassword":"password123","newPassword":"newPassword123"}}
{"query":"mutation UploadAvatar($image: String!) { uploadAvatar(image: $image) }","variables":{"image":"data:image/png;base64,replace_with_base64_image"}}
{"query":"mutation ForgetPassword($email: String!) { forgetPassword(email: $email) }","variables":{"email":"test@example.com"}}

{"query":"mutation ResetPassword($token: String!, $newPassword: String!, $confirmNewPassword: String!) { resetPassword(token: $token, newPassword: $newPassword, confirmNewPassword: $confirmNewPassword) }","variables":{"token":"replace_with_reset_token","newPassword":"password123","confirmNewPassword":"password123"}}

{"query":"query GetAllRooms($query: String, $filters: RoomFilters, $page: Int) { getAllRooms(query: $query, filters: $filters, page: $page) { rooms { id title description roomNumber type pricePerNight capacity location isAvailable images { url public_id } ratings { value count } createdAt updatedAt } pagination { totalRoomCount perPage } } }","variables":{"query":"","filters":{"isAvailable":true},"page":1}}

{"query":"query GetRoomById($roomId: String!) { getRoomById(roomId: $roomId) { id title description roomNumber type pricePerNight capacity location isAvailable images { url public_id } ratings { value count } reviews { id rating comment createdAt user { id name email } } } }","variables":{"roomId":"{{roomId}}"}}

{"query":"mutation CreateRoom($roomInput: RoomInput!) { createNewRoom(roomInput: $roomInput) { id title roomNumber type pricePerNight capacity location isAvailable } }","variables":{"roomInput":{"title":"Deluxe Room","description":"Comfortable room with city view","roomNumber":"A101","type":"deluxe","pricePerNight":120,"capacity":2,"location":"First Floor","isAvailable":true,"images":[]}}}

{"query":"mutation UpdateRoom($roomId: ID!, $roomInput: RoomInput!) { updateRoom(roomId: $roomId, roomInput: $roomInput) }","variables":{"roomId":"{{roomId}}","roomInput":{"title":"Updated Deluxe Room","description":"Updated room description","roomNumber":"A101","type":"deluxe","pricePerNight":135,"capacity":2,"location":"First Floor","isAvailable":true,"images":[]}}}

{"query":"mutation DeleteRoomImage($roomId: ID!, $imageId: String!) { deleteRoomImage(roomId: $roomId, imageId: $imageId) }","variables":{"roomId":"{{roomId}}","imageId":"replace_with_cloudinary_public_id"}}
{"query":"mutation DeleteRoom($roomId: ID!) { deleteRoom(roomId: $roomId) }","variables":{"roomId":"{{roomId}}"}}
{"query":"query GetBookedDatesById($roomId: String!) { getBookedDatesById(roomId: $roomId) }","variables":{"roomId":"{{roomId}}"}}

{"query":"mutation CreateBooking($bookingInput: BookingInput!) { createNewBooking(bookingInput: $bookingInput) { id startDate endDate daysOfRent rentPerDay amount { rent tax discount total } status paymentInfo { id status method } } }","variables":{"bookingInput":{"room":"{{roomId}}","startDate":"2026-05-10","endDate":"2026-05-12","customer":{"name":"Test User","email":"test@example.com"},"amount":{"rent":0,"discount":0,"tax":0,"total":0},"daysOfRent":2,"rentPerDay":120,"referralCode":"","additionalNote":"Near elevator if possible"}}}

{"query":"query GetBookingByUser { getBookingByUser { bookings { id startDate endDate status customer { name email } amount { rent tax discount total } paymentInfo { id status method } room { id title roomNumber } createdAt } meta { totalBookings unpaidBookings needToPay } } }"}

{"query":"query GetBookingById($bookingId: String!) { getBookingById(bookingId: $bookingId) { id startDate endDate status customer { name email } amount { rent tax discount total } paymentInfo { id status method } refundInfo { id amount status refundedAt } room { id title roomNumber } user { id name email } createdAt updatedAt } }","variables":{"bookingId":"{{bookingId}}"}}

{"query":"mutation UpdateBookingPayment($bookingId: String!, $bookingInput: updateBookingPaymentInput!) { updateBookingPayment(bookingId: $bookingId, bookingInput: $bookingInput) }","variables":{"bookingId":"{{bookingId}}","bookingInput":{"paymentInfo":{"status":"paid","method":"cash"}}}}

{"query":"mutation CancelBooking($bookingId: ID!, $reason: String) { cancelBooking(bookingId: $bookingId, reason: $reason) { id status cancelledAt cancelReason refundInfo { id amount status refundedAt } } }","variables":{"bookingId":"{{bookingId}}","reason":"Customer requested cancellation"}}

{"query":"query GetAllBookings { getAllBookings { id startDate endDate status customer { name email } amount { total } paymentInfo { status method } room { id title roomNumber } user { id name email } referralOwner { id name email } createdAt } }"}
{"query":"mutation StripeCheckoutSession($bookingId: ID!) { stripeCheckoutSession(bookingId: $bookingId) { url } }","variables":{"bookingId":"{{bookingId}}"}}

{"query":"mutation StripeBuffetCheckoutSession($buffetBookingId: ID!) { stripeBuffetCheckoutSession(buffetBookingId: $buffetBookingId) { url } }","variables":{"buffetBookingId":"{{buffetBookingId}}"}}
{"type":"checkout.session.completed","data":{"object":{"client_reference_id":"{{bookingId}}"}}}

request.description: This endpoint requires a valid Stripe signature. For local testing, prefer the Stripe CLI to forward signed webhook events.

body.raw: {"query":"query GetAllDishes { getAllDishes { id name cuisineCategory description imageUrl } }"}
{"query":"query GetDishById($dishId: ID!) { getDishById(dishId: $dishId) { id name cuisineCategory description imageUrl } }","variables":{"dishId":"{{dishId}}"}}

{"query":"query GetAvailableBuffetDinners { getAvailableBuffetDinners { id title cuisineCategory description imageUrl startsAt endsAt maxCapacity remainingCapacity pricePerGuest facilities active includedDishes { id name cuisineCategory } } }"}
{"query":"query GetAllBuffetDinners { getAllBuffetDinners { id title cuisineCategory startsAt endsAt maxCapacity remainingCapacity pricePerGuest active } }"}

{"query":"query GetBuffetDinnerById($buffetDinnerId: ID!) { getBuffetDinnerById(buffetDinnerId: $buffetDinnerId) { id title cuisineCategory description imageUrl startsAt endsAt includedDishes { id name cuisineCategory description imageUrl } maxCapacity remainingCapacity pricePerGuest facilities active createdAt updatedAt } }","variables":{"buffetDinnerId":"{{buffetDinnerId}}"}}

{"query":"mutation CreateBuffetDinner($buffetDinnerInput: BuffetDinnerInput!) { createBuffetDinner(buffetDinnerInput: $buffetDinnerInput) }","variables":{"buffetDinnerInput":{"title":"International Dinner Buffet","cuisineCategory":"international","description":"Weekend buffet dinner","imageUrl":"https://example.com/buffet.jpg","startsAt":"2026-05-15T18:00:00.000Z","endsAt":"2026-05-15T21:00:00.000Z","includedDishes":["replace_with_dish_id"],"maxCapacity":60,"pricePerGuest":35,"facilities":["Live station","Dessert bar"],"active":true}}}

{"query":"mutation UpdateBuffetDinner($buffetDinnerId: ID!, $buffetDinnerInput: UpdateBuffetDinnerInput!) { updateBuffetDinner(buffetDinnerId: $buffetDinnerId, buffetDinnerInput: $buffetDinnerInput) }","variables":{"buffetDinnerId":"{{buffetDinnerId}}","buffetDinnerInput":{"title":"Updated Dinner Buffet","maxCapacity":70,"pricePerGuest":40,"active":true}}}
{"query":"mutation DeleteBuffetDinner($buffetDinnerId: ID!) { deleteBuffetDinner(buffetDinnerId: $buffetDinnerId) }","variables":{"buffetDinnerId":"{{buffetDinnerId}}"}}

{"query":"mutation CreateBuffetBooking($bookingInput: BuffetBookingInput!) { createBuffetBooking(bookingInput: $bookingInput) { id guestCount pricePerGuest amount { subtotal tax total } status paymentInfo { id status method } } }","variables":{"bookingInput":{"buffetDinner":"{{buffetDinnerId}}","customer":{"name":"Test User","email":"test@example.com"},"guestCount":2,"additionalNote":"Window table if available"}}}

{"query":"query GetBuffetBookingsByUser { getBuffetBookingsByUser { id guestCount pricePerGuest amount { subtotal tax total } status paymentInfo { id status method } buffetDinner { id title startsAt endsAt } createdAt } }"}

{"query":"query GetBuffetBookingById($buffetBookingId: ID!) { getBuffetBookingById(buffetBookingId: $buffetBookingId) { id guestCount pricePerGuest amount { subtotal tax total } status paymentInfo { id status method } customer { name email } buffetDinner { id title startsAt endsAt } user { id name email } createdAt updatedAt } }","variables":{"buffetBookingId":"{{buffetBookingId}}"}}

{"query":"mutation UpdateBuffetBookingPayment($buffetBookingId: ID!, $bookingInput: UpdateBuffetBookingPaymentInput!) { updateBuffetBookingPayment(buffetBookingId: $buffetBookingId, bookingInput: $bookingInput) }","variables":{"buffetBookingId":"{{buffetBookingId}}","bookingInput":{"paymentInfo":{"status":"paid","method":"cash"}}}}

{"query":"mutation CancelBuffetBooking($buffetBookingId: ID!, $reason: String) { cancelBuffetBooking(buffetBookingId: $buffetBookingId, reason: $reason) { id status cancelledAt cancelReason } }","variables":{"buffetBookingId":"{{buffetBookingId}}","reason":"Customer requested cancellation"}}

{"query":"query GetAllBuffetBookings { getAllBuffetBookings { id guestCount amount { total } status paymentInfo { status method } customer { name email } buffetDinner { id title startsAt } user { id name email } createdAt } }"}
{"query":"query GetAllPromotions { getAllPromotions { id code description discountType discountValue validFrom validTo active maxUses usedCount createdAt updatedAt } }"}

{"query":"query GetPromotionById($promotionId: ID!) { getPromotionById(promotionId: $promotionId) { id code description discountType discountValue validFrom validTo active maxUses usedCount } }","variables":{"promotionId":"{{promotionId}}"}}

{"query":"mutation CreatePromotion($promotionInput: PromotionInput!) { createPromotion(promotionInput: $promotionInput) }","variables":{"promotionInput":{"code":"SUMMER10","description":"Summer discount","discountType":"percentage","discountValue":10,"validFrom":"2026-05-01","validTo":"2026-08-31","active":true,"maxUses":100}}}

{"query":"mutation UpdatePromotion($promotionId: ID!, $promotionInput: UpdatePromotionInput!) { updatePromotion(promotionId: $promotionId, promotionInput: $promotionInput) }","variables":{"promotionId":"{{promotionId}}","promotionInput":{"description":"Updated summer discount","discountValue":15,"active":true}}}
{"query":"mutation DeletePromotion($promotionId: ID!) { deletePromotion(promotionId: $promotionId) }","variables":{"promotionId":"{{promotionId}}"}}
{"query":"query GetAllMembershipTiers { getAllMembershipTiers { id name discountPercentage active createdAt updatedAt } }"}

{"query":"query GetMembershipTierById($membershipTierId: ID!) { getMembershipTierById(membershipTierId: $membershipTierId) { id name discountPercentage active } }","variables":{"membershipTierId":"{{membershipTierId}}"}}

{"query":"mutation CreateMembershipTier($membershipTierInput: MembershipTierInput!) { createMembershipTier(membershipTierInput: $membershipTierInput) }","variables":{"membershipTierInput":{"name":"silver","discountPercentage":5,"active":true}}}

{"query":"mutation UpdateMembershipTier($membershipTierId: ID!, $membershipTierInput: UpdateMembershipTierInput!) { updateMembershipTier(membershipTierId: $membershipTierId, membershipTierInput: $membershipTierInput) }","variables":{"membershipTierId":"{{membershipTierId}}","membershipTierInput":{"discountPercentage":8,"active":true}}}
{"query":"mutation DeleteMembershipTier($membershipTierId: ID!) { deleteMembershipTier(membershipTierId: $membershipTierId) }","variables":{"membershipTierId":"{{membershipTierId}}"}}
{"query":"query ValidateReferralCode($code: String!) { validateReferralCode(code: $code) { isValid ownerName } }","variables":{"code":"REFERRALCODE"}}
{"query":"query CanReview($reviewRoomId: ID!) { canReview(reviewRoomId: $reviewRoomId) }","variables":{"reviewRoomId":"{{roomId}}"}}

{"query":"mutation CreateAndUpdateReview($reviewInput: reviewInput!) { createAndUpdateReview(reviewInput: $reviewInput) { id rating comment createdAt updatedAt } }","variables":{"reviewInput":{"roomId":"{{roomId}}","rating":5,"comment":"Excellent room and service."}}}
{"query":"query GetAllReviews { getAllReviews { id rating comment user { id name email } room { id title roomNumber } createdAt updatedAt } }"}
{"query":"mutation DeleteReviewById($reviewId: ID!) { deleteReviewById(reviewId: $reviewId) }","variables":{"reviewId":"{{reviewId}}"}}
{"query":"query GetAllUsers { getAllUsers { id name email avatar { url public_id } role membershipTier referralCode referralPoints isActive createdAt updatedAt } }"}

{"query":"query GetUserById($userId: ID!) { getUserById(userId: $userId) { id name email avatar { url public_id } role membershipTier referralCode referralPoints isActive createdAt updatedAt } }","variables":{"userId":"{{userId}}"}}

{"query":"mutation UpdateUser($userId: ID!, $roles: [String!], $isActive: Boolean, $membershipTier: String, $referralPointsAdjustment: Int) { updateUser(userId: $userId, roles: $roles, isActive: $isActive, membershipTier: $membershipTier, referralPointsAdjustment: $referralPointsAdjustment) }","variables":{"userId":"{{userId}}","roles":["user"],"isActive":true,"membershipTier":"silver","referralPointsAdjustment":0}}
{"query":"mutation DeleteUser($userId: ID!) { deleteUser(userId: $userId) }","variables":{"userId":"{{userId}}"}}

{"query":"query GetDashboardMetaData($startDate: String!, $endDate: String!) { getDashboardMetaData(startDate: $startDate, endDate: $endDate) { sales { date sales bookings } totalSales totalBookings totalPendingAmount totalPaidCashAmount totalCardSales totalConfirmedBookings totalCancelledBookings averageBookingValue totalRoomsBooked paymentMethodDistribution { method count totalAmount } statusDistribution { status count } } }","variables":{"startDate":"2026-01-01","endDate":"2026-12-31"}}
{"query":"subscription NewBookingNoti { newBookingNoti }"}

request.description: GraphQL subscriptions use ws://localhost:4040/graphql in the app. Postman support depends on the GraphQL WebSocket client used by your Postman version.

body.raw: {"query":"subscription BookingCancelledNoti { bookingCancelledNoti }"}

request.description: GraphQL subscriptions use ws://localhost:4040/graphql in the app. Postman support depends on the GraphQL WebSocket client used by your Postman version.
